description: M.M. Nazar Vs. Chandramalee Muthuhewa Arachchi Mahalekam and 4 Others before Hon. K. M. S. DISSANAYAKE, J
parties: M.M. Nazar Vs. Chandramalee Muthuhewa Arachchi Mahalekam and 4 Others
judgement_by: Hon. K. M. S. DISSANAYAKE, J
keywords: Appeal from a decision of a Provincial High Court established under Article 154P(1) of the Constitution in the exercise of Writ Jurisdiction vested in it by Article 154P(4)(b) of the Constitution-Will a writ of certiorari lie when major facts are in dispute and/or when there is an alternative remedy available
legistation: Constitution, Article 140-Section 18A of the Rent Act as amended
